rulings.Case Title: RICHARD MUSGRAVE VS. ASBESTOS DEFENDANTS (B*P) AS REFLECTED ON EXHIBITS et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion To Set Aside Default And Default Judgment Entered Against Associated Insulation Of California, Inc.
rulings.Rulings: On Asbestos Law and Motion Calendar for November 16, 2016, Wednesday, in Department 503, Line 1. Fireman's Fund Insurance Company's motion to set aside default and default judgment entered against Associated Insulation of California, Inc. is continued to December 7, 2016 per agreement between plaintiff and Fireman's Fund. = (503/GLW)
